1.20.1.1.0.1: Recipes auto-regenerate when mods change or tool_exclusions.json is edited. Vanilla items (e.g. netherite gear in smithing tables) can no longer be crafted via TC ingredient swaps.
1.20.1.1.0.2: Recipe replacement now handles modded recipes that accept multiple items in one ingredient slot (item lists). Fixes Tide 2's fishing rod upgrade smithing recipes: TC fishing rod is now accepted as the base.
1.20.1.1.0.3: Mob equipment replacement now runs last on the mob-spawn event (LOWEST priority), so equipment added by other mods on the same event (e.g. ImprovedMobs) gets swapped to TC equivalents too.
